Home/Proof chain

What you show the buyer

One chain. Six beats. Five minutes.

Skip the deck. Walk from request to receipt to replay — the same path we run every night, live on your screen.

Live forensic proof→ Factory status
Receipts on disk — Governance receipts signed
Proof checks — Live sample · screen-share this number
Rules check — PASS or BLOCK · four checks
Proof sample PDF bundle Status page →
sourcea-boot — ★ Clone eval repo
request→ policy→ decision→ receipt→ replay→ tamper-FAIL
01

Brief

Scope the job and lock your rules.

02

Dispatch

Policy checked before any agent acts.

03

Run

Specialists execute under the gate.

04

Gate

The gate refuses a bad move — BLOCK.

05

Receipt

Signed evidence written to disk.

06

Replay

Client audits the whole run on site.

01

Something proposes action

Outreach, ops, research — your loop asks to run.

scoped inbox → role check
02

Your rules load first

Policy on disk, scope check, feasibility — before any model token spends.

rules check → PASS
03

Dispatch gate fires

This action, this moment — not governance you discussed at kickoff.

04

Verdict lands on disk

ALLOW or BLOCK — where replay can find it tomorrow.

PASS · BLOCK · tamper-FAIL
05

The loop runs — or stops

Blocked actions never touch production.

06

You export proof

Weekly bundle: HTML, PDF, replay script, handoff for your client.

export → replay → handoff
replay · sourcea-boot

Sample boot run · 2026-06-18 00:04:50 UTC · BLOCK

$ sourcea-boot --json
SOURCEA_SAMPLE_BOOT BLOCK ok=false
  [PASS] policy_pack: agency v3.2 current
  [PASS] provider: voyage semantic active
  [PASS] receipt_fresh: receipt fresh (0.3h)
  [FAIL] pipeline_sync: queue mismatch (sample)
REPORT=/Users/sinakazemnezhad/Desktop/SourceA/BOOT_REPORT.json▋

Full stack on camera

SourceA commercial film. Platform · Factory · BLOCK · Proof.

~75 seconds — real :5180 UI, Worker Hub, Mac Health. ElevenLabs narration. No deck.

SourceA commercial · ultra capture · word-synced captions

What buyers see

  1. Platform — policy at dispatch on live landing
  2. Factory — Worker Hub queue truth
  3. BLOCK — cross-lane edit refused on disk
  4. Proof — W1 embed + export validators
W1 hero film ↓ Book screen-share

Watch before you book

W1 demo film. ALLOW · BLOCK · tamper-FAIL.

Five minutes on camera — the same beats you screen-share live. No deck. Receipts on disk.

W1 proof film · real UI capture · AI narration

Run in 5 minutes

  1. pip install sourcea-boot or clone sourcea-io/sourcea-boot
  2. sourcea-boot --json — four checks, PASS or BLOCK
  3. Walk live scenario for ALLOW/BLOCK/tamper beats

Interactive film uses live factory boot — same terminal your buyer sees on screen-share

Play Governance Gauntlet → Book live screen-share

Your 15-minute demo script

What to show. In what order.

Procurement closes when you skip the deck and walk the chain cold — the same path we run every night.

01

Session gate PASS

Show stack version and role scope load from disk — not chat memory.

02

ALLOW on outreach

One governed send with scope, timestamp, policy version on the receipt.

03

BLOCK on ops

Cross-lane edit refused — no file touched, receipt says BLOCK.

04

Tamper-FAIL

Alter a hash live — spine catches it immediately. That is the wow moment.
